message:
test(proptest): add 23 property tests for extension preflight and dispatcher modules (bd-3ar8v.4.49)

Extension preflight (11 tests): eval_call no false positive on method
calls and identifier suffixes, dynamic_import filters static imports
and detects import(), extract_quoted_string roundtrips for double/single
quotes and returns None for unquoted, debugger_statement determinism,
timer_abuse threshold at 10ms, hardcoded_secret detects token prefixes,
hardcoded_secret ignores env lookups.

Extension dispatcher (12 tests): shannon_entropy non-negative, bounded
by log2(256), zero for empty input, zero for single byte, near-maximal
for uniform distribution, llc_miss_proxy bounded [0,1] and zero on
empty, normalized_shadow_op idempotent and case-insensitive,
shadow_safe_session_op/tool case-insensitive, usize_to_f64 monotonic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
